original: This backpack isn’t any better than what you’re already using.

Due to the eggs’ fast growth, you often catch yourself worrying about stretch marks. Then you you remember that your microsurgeons will keep you safe from the majority of such damages. [pc.Belly] stretched tight around the eggs, definite rounded bumps are visible through your [pc.skinFurScales]. The eggs might be approaching their time to be laid, judging by the amount of activity in them. Occasionally you find yourself thinking about Tarkus and its sandy regions as you massage your belly, though you usually stop yourself before you daydream too much. Sand isn’t something you usually devote much thought to, so you figure that the parasite must be influencing your thoughts in order to ensure that you lay the eggs near soft ground.

to compensate for the big baby bulge you are now sporting, packed with life. What’s inside you squirms all the time, ticklish and intimate, never letting you forget its – or rather their – presence for a moment. Your nipples have spread, your boobs plumping up as they prepare to feed your children. It makes you laugh groaningly. You suspect what you’re bearing has little interest in [pc.milk].
Your stomach turns suddenly, sending you into a panic of nausea. You lean over, feeling as if you could vomit, but hold it in. That was abrupt.

You feel slightly nauseous as you’re walking, light-headedness suddenly washing over you before passing every bit as quickly, leaving you with a slight stirring in your [pc.stomach]. Your codex chirps a notification at you - you’re pregnant!\n\nA rapidly-scrolling text informs you that the pregnancy is Milodan, and you briefly remember the time you spent in the snow under the barbarian. It looks like his effort to breed you did pay off in the end. You wonder, just for a moment, if he had any inkling that his kits would have a better life than he has... if he knows that you’ll care for them, away from the harshness of Uveto’s glacial wastes. They’ll get a fair shot at life in the safety of your nursery on Tavros when the time comes.

Your moods and emotions have grown irregular, things feel a little bit floatier than normal. Sometimes you’ll be going about your business and feel unusually angry, aroused or even distressed from a thought or incident. Hormones, right...?
Even the ship’s crew has been giving you a wide berth.
You stop yourself, seemingly at random, and plant a hand soothingly over your [pc.belly]. The eggs inside you shift slightly, making your

original: You must be getting close to delivering by now. You’ve swollen to uncomfortably large proportions, your pregnancy readily evident to everyone around you.
Your tummy hangs low to the ground

, full of Milodan kits waiting to be unleashed on the toys in the nursery. You wind up thinking as you walk, wondering what your children will go on to do. The luxury of having Steele Tech’s backing is that the potential for your offspring is effectively limitless; if nothing else, they can be brought up in comfort.
Giving birth must be right around the corner - if you get any bigger, you’re going to pop! Getting around is proving to be somewhat difficult, your mobility hindered by
your stomach almost touching the ground

. On the bright side, your babies have been a little less active than usual. No doubt they’re getting ready for their grand debut. You have to wonder if babies of other races are this physical, or if it’s just the Milodan...

Your codex beeps, notifying you that you’re pregnant. Based on the readouts, you’re almost assuredly carrying Zephyr’s child. You give a little sigh of happiness, thinking about how thrilled your lover will be to have an addition to your

Your pregnancy seems to be progressing normally, with your [pc.stomach] slowly swelling outwards over the "+{var0}+", full of new life. You can’t help but feel a warm bliss as you look down at your gravid tummy, a sense of fulfillment that serves as a reward for taking care of your unborn offspring like this. It’s hard to describe, but you think the word you’d use is “motherly”.

Though, at the same time, your stomach has been hindering your movement and impairing your ability to navigate more difficult terrain.

Maybe you should find somewhere nice to settle down and wait out this pregnancy before you continue your adventures in uncharted space.

original: A three foot high, oblong ball of goo jiggles and wobbles across from you, its surface somehow holding back the liquid weight inside even though it appears no more solid than the rest of it. Atop the mound of viridian goop is the torso of an ultrapornstar goddess. Pendulous breasts hang from the front of her glittering chest, obscuring everything above her navel with gooey boob. Her eyes glitter with a predatory mirth, slightly darker in hue than the rest of her, a color matched by her plump, wet-looking lips. You need to defeat her if you ever want to lay claim to Dad’s fortune and make him proud!

Lerris busies herself with her prodigious tits whilst you browse the shops wares; casting a casual glance in her direction, you catch her squeezing her boobs together with her arms, wiggling this way and that...

original: “Hello and welcome to my shop. Take a gander and let me know if you see anything you like,”
“You have items ready to be spiritually appraised and elevated, then?” Artie rubs his hands in anticipation as you approach his crate. “Let’s see what you have and what they are, ahem, worth.”
Your attack sinks into the goo, the wound vanishing almost instantly as her surface recloses.
Your attack sinks into the goo, the wound vanishing almost instantly as her surface recloses.
Your attack fails to damage the ‘bot.

The blonde cyborg in front of you is tall, her muscular form shrouded by a black tunic cut from some synthetic fabric interwoven with graphene. A matching pair of shorts, a utility belt and a worn pair of boots make up the rest of her livery. Her prosthetic arm is rock steady as she grips her flechetter, belaying the casual, almost nonchalant, expression plastered across her face as her piercing grey eyes survey you.
Here: the finest goods I can spare without risking our hides.

Take aim at a target’s head for additional level-scaled damage (unresistable), intelligence-scaled critical chance, and a chance to blind the target.

Electrically overload a melee weapon for a single strike, dealing intelligence-scaled electricity damage that splashes onto other enemies. Automatically stuns robotic and heavily augmented foes.
Projects an entropic field over the surrounding area for three turns, dealing low, unavoidable damage and repeatedly attempting to sunder affected targets.
Causes gravity to become crushingly high, dealing moderate unresistable damage to all enemies and additional kinetic damage to flying enemies. May cause the tripped condition.
Applies a vortex to a target that draws attacks toward them, reducing dodge chance by 50% and increasing all damage taken by 15% for 5 rounds.
Deal a moderate amount of Crushing kinetic damage. Organic opponents can be stunned for 2-3 turns. Has a four round cooldown.
Thin the fabric of reality in this location, increasing the damage of your activated psionic abilities by 20% for the remainder of the fight.
Allows sight without sight. On activation remove any blinding effects, become immune to blind, and gain +10 accuracy for the remainder of the encounter.
Purges all internal poison and aphrodisiac effects with a scouring rush of physioactive psychic power. Increases resistance to poison and drug damage by 25% for the remainder of combat.

Now, imagine a great big lion right out of Africa, a strong, lightning-fast beauty of a huntress, and combine that with the stealth and venom of a deadly adder, and you’ve got the naleen in a nutshell. I’ll have to be so, so careful dealing with these predators, or I’m dead for sure.”

For someone supposedly tracking down a lethal hunter, she seems oddly cheerful about it. She crests a hill, tumbles through a thick bush, and eventually comes to a clearing in the jungle, one of the few places where the sun actually gets through to the ground. Resting atop a large boulder in the center is

“Holy smokes! Looks like I forgot the most deadly attack the naleen have: a crushing vice-like grip of the tail. I’ll be dead in seconds if I don’t think of a way out of this; she’ll crush the air right from my lungs.”
